'''鈭歜-j-p-y''' ('''kabajpeyoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:twight|twight]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-j-p-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:twight|twight]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歜-j-p-y
|-
! Lemma
| kabajpeyoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thibajpeyoko|thibajpeyoko]] || [[word:jibajpeyoko|jibajpeyoko]] || [[word:shibajpeyoko|shibajpeyoko]] || [[word:kibajpeyoko|kibajpeyoko]]

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
